CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2015 Off Calendar

MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendants Natures Answer, Inc. And Bio-Botanica, Inc.
Off Calendar Jun-24-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Philip Emmons, of Law Office of Philip T. Emmons, Tel. 925.287.6436, for plaintiffs;
Stacy E. Don, of Toledo Don LLP, Tel. 916.462.8952, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court required parties to appear. PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL RESEARCH CENTER, INC.'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendants Nature's Answer, Inc. And Bio-Botanica, Inc. is approved. Order and Consent Judgment signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
